pages.text: $(thing)Air curing$() is the slow, steady way to dry leaf. Requirements:$(br2)- No rain$(br)- Enough skylight$(br)- Time
Air curing takes about $(item)3 Minecraft days$(). It can work in open air or under cover, as long as the rack has suitable conditions.
Air curing is slower than other methods, but it is stable and reliable. Covered racks are safer than leaving leaf exposed to the sky.
